Cash only, narrower than cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at close of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending balance mirrors CHE in some years, but balance sheet label is preferred.

candidates.why: Beginning balance, not end-of-period balance sheet cash.

variables.notes: There are duplicate rows with the same exact label across years; using the exact reported label once is appropriate.

Component of current liabilities, not total.

Specific non-current liability line, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Current financing debt line on the balance sheet; preferred over maturity schedule when presented in current liabilities.
Explicit current maturities of long-term debt; useful for years where current borrowings are shown via maturity schedule.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet short-term debt stock.

variables.notes: Selected the current balance-sheet debt line and excluded lease-related rows per rule. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting with current liabilities to credit institutions.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Clean total PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Could also represent total/net PPE, but appears as a balancing/subtotal line and is less clean.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset component, not standard total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Intangible asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - Other - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Intangible contra-asset, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment including Intangible Assets - Gain/Loss - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow capex item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Preferred clean PPE balance-sheet line over balancing-value subtotal.
